rulings.Case Title: JESUS EDUARDO PACHECO VS. NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Norcal Waste Systems, Inc., Yuba Sutter Disposal, Inc. And Richard C. Burnett'S Motion For Change Of Venue And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 15, 2009, line 17, Defendants Norcal Waste Systems, Inc., Yuba Sutter Disposal, Inc. and Richard C. Burnett's Motion for Change of Venue and Request for sanctions (transferred from Department 301, per recusal of Judge Busch). Motion for change of venue is denied. The motion may not be properly made until the answer is filed. San Francisco is a proper court for the filing of this action. Insufficient declarations supporting change of venue for convenience of witnesses, and that the ends of justice will be served by the change. Requests for sanctions denied. =(302/CWW)
